message:
fix(ci): lint errors and port collision in integration tests

- Fix errcheck: handle gz.Close() error in log rotation compressFile
- Fix errcheck: acknowledge os.Rename result in log rotation
- Fix misspell: stabilise → stabilize in convoy_manager comment
- Fix integration tests: gt install now reuses existing Dolt server on
  the target port instead of failing with "port already in use". This
  fixes the TestBeadsDbInitAfterClone and TestAgentWorktreesStayClean
  failures in CI where the testcontainer Dolt server occupies the port.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
